title: The Heart of Midlothian
author: Walter Scott
subjects: Bothwell Bridge, Battle of, Scotland, 1679 in fiction
description: The Heart of Mid-Lothian is the seventh of Sir Walter Scott's Waverley Novels. It was originally published in four volumes on 25 July 1818, under the title of Tales of My Landlord, 2nd series, and the author was given as "Jedediah Cleishbotham, Schoolmaster and Parish-clerk of Gandercleugh".
